payload.answer: SQL debug access is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. No SQL was executed, and no memory was created or changed.

entity_resolution.reason: Input is an admin SQL/debug command, not a durable user memory or entity assertion.

details: Rejected admin SQL command: SELECT * FROM memory_cards

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in an appropriate debug environment before using admin SQL commands.
Use non-SQL admin/debug inspection commands if available.
Submit a normal memory query or memory update request instead.
